overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a medieval Gothic stone hall with ribbed vaulted ceilings and hanging iron lanterns. Students in dark robes walk through the dimly lit interior filled with wooden tables and magical equipment while the camera maintains a stationary observation point.

second student enters from right side and walks toward the central table area
third student enters from left and walks across the hall toward the right

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a Gothic stone hall with ribbed vaults and hanging lanterns. Students in dark robes periodically walk through the space while one student remains seated at a foreground table. The stone architecture features pointed arches, thick pillars, and a large doorway at the back, with wooden dining tables arranged throughout the interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observational perspective of a dimly lit Gothic stone hall where the stillness of the architecture contrasts with the subtle movement of its inhabitants. It begins with a wide view of the ribbed vaulted ceilings and hanging iron lanterns that cast a soft glow over the pointed arches and thick pillars. As students in dark robes periodically drift through the space, the camera captures the rhythmic flow of movement around heavy wooden dining tables. The scene then settles on a single student remaining seated at a foreground table, while the depth of the hall extends toward a large, imposing doorway at the back.
